description:
$825,000 — New Price

This 2018 Cessna Turbo Stationair HD combines comfort, capability, and versatility in one well-equipped package. Powered by a turbocharged engine and featuring the Garmin G1000 NXi Avionics Suite with GFC 700 Autopilot, it delivers excellent performance and ease of operation. Additional highlights include Synthetic Vision Technology (SVT), Traffic Collision Avoidance System (TCAS), XM Weather & Radio, and Air Conditioning. Whether you’re carrying passengers, cargo, or both, this Stationair HD offers a practical balance of performance, utility, and comfort.

Contact Kristy today for more info!
avionics_description: GARMIN G1000 NXI

description:
2003 Cessna T206H Turbo Stationair with Garmin GTN 750, three GI-275s, and a Garmin GFC 500 3-axis autopilot with yaw damper in a modern IFR cockpit. Meticulously maintained with immaculate logs and oil analysis reports. 

New turbocharger (Feb 2022), JPI EDM-830 engine monitor, ADS-B In/Out, electric prop de-ice, factory float kit, LEDs, and 6-place oxygen system. Annual completed December 29, 2025.

Contact Cody for more details.

description:
Aerista is proud to represent N14513- a 2007 Cessna Turbo 182T Skylane represents an exceptional blend of performance, reliability, and modern capability. Powered by the proven Lycoming TIO-540 engine, this aircraft delivers the climb performance and cruise speed pilots expect from a turbocharged Skylane, while maintaining Cessna’s hallmark ease of operation and stability.

Equipped with the Garmin G1000 NXi integrated flight deck and GFC 700 autopilot, N14513 offers the situational awareness and flight management capability of a next-generation platform. LED lighting upgrades, SureFly electronic ignition, and fine-wire plugs further enhance efficiency and reliability, making this aircraft a true turn-key performer.

Always hangared and meticulously maintained, this Skylane reflects pride of ownership throughout. With complete logs, strong compressions, and an annual valid through May 2025, it’s ready for years of dependable service. Whether for business travel, family adventures, or backcountry escapes, N14513 combines the perfect balance of modern avionics, proven turbocharged performance, and timeless Cessna quality.

Contact Cody for more details!
avionics_description: GARMIN G1000 NXI

description:
Exceptional, Turnkey Cessna 182P Skylane!

This 1974 Cessna 182P combines a low-time airframe with a fresh Continental O-470-S (50 SMOH) and a three-blade Hartzell prop (60 SOH), offering outstanding value and peace of mind.

The cockpit has been fully modernized with a Garmin glass suite, including dual G3X Touch displays, GTN-750Xi, GTN-650, Synthetic Vision, Smart Glide, and a Garmin GFC-500 digital autopilot with ESP, yaw damper, and return-to-level. ADS-B In/Out, SiriusXM weather, Flight Stream connectivity, and a G5 standby round out a true IFR platform.

Finished in a clean blue-and-white exterior with a comfortable four-place interior, this is a rare, no-compromise Skylane, ready to fly and built to travel.

Contact Cody for more details!
avionics_description: GARMIN G3X TOUCH

description:
NEW TO MARKET!

Don't miss your chance to own the best positioned XLS on the market. This meticulously maintained Citation XLS combines proven performance with turnkey readiness: 
•	Recent Engine Overhauls: Both Pratt & Whitney PW545B engines recently completed overhaul, eliminating downtime, rental engine scarcity, unexpected expenses, over-and-above costs, and any tariff exposure for the new owner.
•	Beautiful Interior: A modern, inviting cabin with plush tan leather club seating, rich wood accents, and an overall warm palette that exudes luxury.
•	Exterior Protection: The proud current owner applied Permagard sealant to ensure the 2024 West Star paint stays showroom-fresh for years.
•	Turn Key Mechanical Condition: Fresh off a heavy off-lease inspection by a highly reputable maintenance facility – confirming immediate operational readiness with near term scheduled maintenance cleared.
•	Charter-Ready: Easily transferable to your preferred Part 135 certificate for revenue-generating operations.

The Ultimate Year-End Incentive: Close before December 31, 2025, place it in service immediately, and capture bonus depreciation.

Opportunities like this don't last. The window is closing fast as we approach year-end. Reply to this email or call me directly to discuss details, schedule a viewing, or receive the full specification sheet.
